column1: # Tab-separated file defining samples to process
#   platform    - Sequencing platform: ILLUMINA, PACBIO, ONT (required)
#   r1          - Path to R1 FASTQ (for short reads)
#   r2          - Path to R2 FASTQ (for short reads)
#   long_reads  - Path to long reads FASTQ (for PacBio/ONT)
#   read_type   - Long read type: hifi, clr, ont (for long reads)
#   - Use absolute paths or paths relative to the Snakefile
#   - Leave empty fields for inapplicable columns
